deliverables: ProteinStructure3D cleanup stops viewer spin and removes models/shapes/labels before DOM cleanup.
Resize observer skips viewer resize/render when the observed container has zero width or height.
Regression tests cover unmount cleanup and zero-size resize behavior.
success_criteria: Browser tab-churn smoke check shows no repeated WebGL framebuffer warnings after returning to 3D Structure.
testable_behaviors: Switching away from and back to the 3D Structure tab does not leave active 3Dmol spin/render loops attached to a zero-size or unmounted canvas.
scope_boundaries: Do not rewrite the 3D viewer or replace 3Dmol.js.
Do not alter WT/mutant/DGC rendering semantics beyond lifecycle guards.
